entity.summary: Automated-market-maker exchange on the Aurora EVM network, supporting token swaps, liquidity pools, farming, and historical cross-chain asset integrations.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2021-12-01 as a month-level launch marker because current exchange databases identify a 2021 establishment year and contemporaneous NEAR ecosystem records show active AuroraSwap community and protocol use during December 2021. Current CoinGecko markets show low but non-zero volume, supporting active status.

events.title: AuroraSwap entered public operation on Aurora
events.description: AuroraSwap began operating as an automated-market-maker exchange and yield-farming venue on the Aurora EVM network.
events.notes: The exact launch day was not recovered. The date is normalized to the start of the first month with independently preserved public operation.

events.title: AuroraSwap and Allbridge launched a SOL bridge route
events.description: AuroraSwap and Allbridge introduced a cross-chain route intended to bring SOL assets into the Aurora ecosystem.
events.notes: Recorded as an early cross-chain expansion milestone.

evidence.title: AuroraSwap exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange profile identifies AuroraSwap as established in 2021 and reports live Aurora-chain markets and non-zero recent volume.

evidence.title: NEAR RU December 2021 ecosystem report
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous NEAR ecosystem report records AuroraSwap community activity and an AMA during December 2021.

evidence.title: New innovative DEX on Aurora Chain
evidence.notes: Early January 2022 report describes the already-operational AuroraSwap AMM, swap fees, and liquidity-provider model.

evidence.title: Allbridge and AuroraSwap launched a new cross-chain bridge for SOL
evidence.notes: Dated report records the joint SOL bridge route into the Aurora ecosystem.

evidence.title: AuroraSwap application
evidence.notes: The official exchange application remains linked by current market trackers.

evidence.title: Partnership with AuroraSwap
evidence.notes: Official oracle-provider partnership identifies AuroraSwap as an Aurora-chain DEX and cross-chain algorithmic-stablecoin venue.
